text:
Housekeeping week. 🧹 The SDK moved house and lost some weight (renamed & cleaned up). We also taught the platform to fix its own bugs—which is either brilliant or the beginning of the end. Plus, the documentation maps are actually readable now.

Ship list:
- SDK/MCP package cleanup
- Auto-polly AI bug fixer
- Streamlined onboarding & API guides

Check the repo for the messy details.

#pollinations #opensource #aitools #pixelart #creativecoding #indiedev #refactoring #softwareengineering
